name: E-1 severity override: doctor --explain refuses to resolve without --profile <path> because the resolution chain anchors on the root profile
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-001 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q -- '--profile <path> required' err.txt && echo profile_required 1>&2
